error.invalid_device_id: Device ID must be between 0 and 67108863.
error.no_response: No response detected. Put the device in pairing mode again and retry.

pairing_mode.description: Bring device into learn mode by pushing it's button for more than 2 seconds, then press Ok.
pairing_mode.title: Pair device

pairing_result.description: Select Yes to continue setup. Select No to return to learn mode and resend the learn command.
pairing_result.title: Confirm pairing

user.description: Choose the transmitter and configure your device settings.
